title: Atlas migration timeline review
text: The Atlas migration slipped by six weeks after the vendor API certification arrived late. Teams then compressed testing to recover the schedule.

title: Ownership memo
text: Responsibility for Atlas was split between the infrastructure group and the application team. No single lead had authority to resolve cross-team blockers quickly.

title: Technical postmortem
text: A memory leak in the authentication service and a schema mismatch in the migration pipeline caused repeated deployment failures during integration.

title: Stakeholder review
text: Late compliance requests changed the project scope after development had already started. Executive stakeholders also approved new reporting requirements in the final month.

title: Budget note
text: The project exceeded its cloud budget after repeated re-runs of the migration environment. The cost overrun was treated as a consequence rather than the root cause.

title: Launch celebration draft
text: The communications team prepared a launch event and internal announcement materials for the expected go-live date.
